creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
On FreeBSD 10.0 i386, multimedia/transcode fails to compile if options MPEG2 and X264 are defined (this is different from the default, where they are turned off).

Fix: use GCC for compiling:

USE_GCC= any

The problem surfaces when compiling filter/yuvdenoise/motion.c.
